text_block_list.text:
I'm out in the courtyard during lunch talking to
Biwa Hayahide, when...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Hey, you two! You seen Brian anywhere?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
No, not today. Why do you ask? Did something
happen?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Nah, it's not a big deal or anything. I made her
lunch, but forgot to give it to her.
choice_data_list: You made lunch for Narita Brian?
You made lunch for Narita Brian?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Yep. That girl is picky as heck, though. There's
only a handful of things she'll actually eat!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
But I figure I can't just let her starve, so I make
her lunch every now and again.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
My sister's diet is beyond unbalanced, so your
efforts are appreciated, Hishi.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I still remember the difficulties I faced whenever I
used to make curry for her.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
She'd stop eating it altogether if she detected
even a hint of vegetables, so I had to try many
combinations until it was just right.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I'd have to mince and stew the veggies for hours,
but once I achieved the right taste, she couldn't
get enough!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! Wow, it's hard to imagine her being so
spoiled now.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Well... That was quite some time ago.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
As for these days, forget about cooking―we
hardly even have the chance to eat together at
all.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I bet she'd still happily gobble up your food. Why
not give it a shot?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I don't think so... That was long ago, and our
relationship isn't what it once was.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
We don't live together anymore, so suddenly
pushing food upon her would be rather awk—

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Ugh, don't be nuts!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
You think too much. You just gotta do it! Act
first, and figure out the rest later!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
You and me—we're gonna cook up somethin'
after school today. See you in the cafeteria
kitchen!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: You better be there!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: ...I didn't even have a chance to object.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Well... I can't simply ignore her, so I suppose I'll
have to go.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
All right! Time to make something that'll knock
Brian's socks off!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... The question is, what should that
something be?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Care to offer your thoughts on the matter,
Trainer?
choice_data_list: A nutritious curry to give her strength.
A thick hamburger steak to boost her stamina.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Nice! That oughta bring back some good
memories for her.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
It's been quite some time since I made curry for
her. I hardly remember the recipe anymore.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
However, I cannot deny that curry is a good
choice. Vegetables, meat, and carbohydrates, all
on one plate.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Although I don't recall the exact recipe, I'll do my
best to replicate the flavor.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: ...And, it's finished!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
How curious, though. It's been years, yet
somehow I remembered precisely what to do at
every step.
choice_data_list: All that hard work really sunk in, huh?
All that hard work really sunk in, huh?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I suppose so.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...That smell sure brings back memories.

text_block_list.name: The Two
text_block_list.text: Brian?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
In the flesh... I knew this had to be my sister's
curry.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Mind if I tear in? I was just about to scrounge up a
snack.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Yep, that's Big Sis's curry, all right.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I'll have seconds.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Oh! O-of course!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Haha! Look at that face!

Watching her little sister eat, Biwa Hayahide can't
even begin to hide her joy.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Hmm... An interesting proposal.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Stamina is essential for tempering a strong body...
Hamburger steak it is, then!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Come to think of it, I do recall having made
hamburger steak occasionally. It wasn't always
curry, of course.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
In fact, hamburger steak afforded me an even
greater chance to sneak some vegetables in
without her noticing.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! I do the same thing! As long as it still
looks and tastes like meat, it usually passes the
test.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Brian's palate is a lot simpler than you'd think.

The two of them chat away as they prepare a
meal for Narita Brian. Until...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
And it's done! One stealthy hamburger steak with
extra hidden vegetables!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
The veggies are mixed into the sauce, too, as
opposed to just the—

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: You seem to be having a good time, Sis.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Brian?! Wh-what are you doing here...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Amazon told me to come. Apparently there's
something you want me to eat?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Sorry for not tellin' you... But since you went
through all the trouble of cooking, I wanted to
make sure it paid off.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Of course you did. Well, I suppose the cat's out of the bag.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hm, pretty good. Meat is the best. It gives me energy.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Oh! Hehe, looks like it worked, Hayahide!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Haha, so it did.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: What are you two mumbling about?

The two of them keep Narita Brian company as
she finishes off the lovingly prepared hamburger
steak.
